arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou tipped to be sacked BEFORE Tottenham face Rangers as Brendan Rodgers favourite to replace him
arts.sum: The 59-year-old is feeling a bit of heat early in the season and bookies reckon he could be out of a job in London before Christmas

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool and Spurs scouted the same player in the Champions League this week
arts.sum: Premier League clubs Arsenal, Liverpool and Tottenham are all interested in the same player. They scouted him in the Champions League this week when the player featured for Atalanta against Arsenal. According to TBR Football, several Premier League clubs were present in Bergamo to watch Atalanta winger Ademola Lookman. Along with the pacey winger, they […] The post Arsenal, Liverpool and Spurs scouted the same player in the Champions League this week appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur Announces GroundWOW as the Club’s Official Ground Printing Supplier
arts.sum: The Club has been working with GroundWOW to deliver high-definition printed logos on the pitch-side areas at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium using its autonomous robotic technology. David Pritchard, Chief Commercial Officer at GroundWOW said: “We are delighted to be working with Tottenham Hotspur as their Official Ground Printing Supplier.

arts.ttl: “I’d say one thing” – Stan Collymore’s advice for Tottenham’s Brennan Johnson after social media abuse
arts.sum: Earlier this week Tottenham’s Brennan Johnson earned his side a place in the next round of the Carabao Cup with a fine injury-time finish against Coventry City. It came in the wake of social media abuse directed at the player which resulted in him deleting some of his social accounts. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham and Liverpool watched £51m player in the Champions League last night
arts.sum: Arsenal, Liverpool, Tottenham and Newcastle United all sent scouts to watch Ademola Lookman and Ederson in action last night.

arts.ttl: Tottenham ready to submit formal offer to sign €35m-rated La Liga ace
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are interested in signing the Valencia midfielder Javi Guerra. According to Fichajes, Tottenham are preparing a formal offer to sign the 21-year-old central midfielder when the transfer window reopens in January and it remains to be seen whether they are ready to pay the asking price for him. arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea and Tottenham learn asking price for attacking target
arts.sum: Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly keen on signing the Sporting CP winger Geovany Quenda. According to a report from HITC, the 17-year-old winger is on the radar of the three English clubs and he could cost around £84 million because of a release clause in his contract. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham are “not confirming” interest in special South American talent
arts.sum: The summer transfer window passed by without too much action as far as Tottenham Hotspur were concerned. arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham star has no future at the club beyond this season
arts.sum: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou has made some big changes at the club after arriving last summer. He has signed new players, offloaded the deadwood of the squad and built an attacking style of play.
